subject: At Maldives
body:
Met the new president of Maldives 
We will invest in their port and logistic park the Chinese are financing the the project 
The president is very smart he knows what he wants he asked my advice and help to develop a finance center to attract Indian businessmen very interesting 


Sent from my iPhone
